summary: Tested Command Center page, Network Topology with Live Threats, Critical Alerts endpoints, and deployment endpoints. All features working correctly. Command Center has 4 tabs (Pending Approvals, Active Threats, Agent Control, History). Network Topology shows Live Threats panel, Auto-Kill Alerts panel, and threat nodes on the map. Critical alerts POST/GET endpoints working. Agent scripts have auto-kill functionality for CRITICAL threats.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - returns access_token and user
POST /api/swarm/alerts/critical - receives auto-kill notifications (status: received)
GET /api/swarm/alerts/critical - returns alerts list with count
GET /api/swarm/alerts/critical?acknowledged=false - filters unacknowledged alerts
POST /api/swarm/deploy/single - queues single device deployment
POST /api/swarm/deploy/winrm - queues WinRM deployment
GET /api/network/topology - returns nodes and links for network map
GET /api/swarm/overview - returns devices, agents, telemetry, deployments stats
GET /api/swarm/telemetry?severity=critical - returns critical events
POST /api/swarm/telemetry/ingest - ingests telemetry events
GET /api/agent-commands/pending - returns pending approval commands
GET /api/agent-commands/history - returns command history
GET /api/agent-commands/agents/status - returns connected agents
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/v7 - downloads v7 agent with auto-kill
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/mobile-v7 - downloads mobile v7 agent
Command Center page loads at /command-center with data-testid
Command Center has 4 tabs: Pending Approvals, Active Threats, Agent Control, Command History
Command Center shows stats: Agents Online, Pending Commands, Active Threats, Commands Executed
Network Topology page loads at /network with data-testid
Network Topology shows stats: Total Nodes, Live Threats, Critical Alerts, Attackers, Compromised, Suspicious
Network Topology has Live Threats panel showing critical threats
Network Topology has Auto-Kill Alerts panel showing AUTO_KILL_EXECUTED alerts
Network Topology shows threat nodes (red) on the network graph
Network Topology has Legend with color coding
Sidebar navigation shows Command Center link
Sidebar navigation shows Network Map link
seraph_defender_v7.py has auto_kill_enabled and auto_kill_severities for CRITICAL threats
seraph_mobile_v7.py has auto_kill_enabled and MOBILE_AUTO_KILL functionality

features: Approve & Execute / Reject buttons for pending commands
Kill Process / Details buttons for active threats
Agent control cards with Scan, Forensics, Restart, Update buttons

panels: Live Threats panel with critical threats (process.suspicious, file.change)
Auto-Kill Alerts panel with Credential Theft Attempt (AUTO_KILL_EXECUTED)
graph_features: Threat nodes shown in red (Threat: test-host-0, Threat: workstation-003)
Legend with Attacker/Compromised, Suspicious, Protected, Normal colors

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data and created test critical alert
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center page at /command-center is fully functional with 4 tabs (Pending Approvals, Active Threats, Agent Control, History). Network Topology at /network shows Live Threats panel, Auto-Kill Alerts panel, and threat nodes on the map. Critical alerts endpoints POST/GET /api/swarm/alerts/critical are working. Agent scripts (seraph_defender_v7.py, seraph_mobile_v7.py) have auto-kill functionality for CRITICAL threats. All 15 backend tests passed.
